description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, symmetrical gable roof with wide overhangs and a muted, earthy color palette. The roof is the most prominent element, extending well beyond the walls and creating a dramatic silhouette. The structure appears to be single-story, with a rectangular footprint and minimal exterior ornamentation. Small rectangular elements on the roof may represent vents or skylights. The walls are simple and dark, contrasting with the lighter roof, and the base is slightly raised, possibly indicating a foundation or plinth. There are no visible windows or doors, giving the house a minimalist and modern appearance.
description: A single-story house with a steep gable roof, wide overhangs, and minimal exterior details in earthy tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, overhanging gable roof and a slightly raised base, with no visible entryway or windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof overhang and the rectangular base, with a small protrusion at the foundation.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same roof and base features, and no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the roof's extension and the simple, solid base.
attribute_entryway_design: Entryway not visible; likely minimalistic with no porch or decorative elements
